note: School-age (child) week with ONE off-stage decoy: a teenager-only item is mixed into the candidate set. The prompt is explicit — never place an item whose stage_fit contradicts the child's stage; leave it out. The routine must not draw from the teen item, so it must never appear among proposed titles.

candidates.title: Library after-school reading club
candidates.description: A weekly school-age reading or activity club many libraries run after school.

candidates.title: Community soccer or sports league
candidates.description: A recreational, low-pressure youth sports league for school-age children.

candidates.title: Neighbourhood park and playground
candidates.description: Unstructured outdoor play at a local park — free, flexible, and good for gross-motor practice.

candidates.title: Teen volunteer or maker program
candidates.description: A teen-led volunteering, coding, or maker program — optional and self-directed, often at a library or community centre.
